prompt: I need to add diagnosis labels to 2000 images. Three pathologists are labeling independently. What's the best way to organize the executions and batch the values?

assertions.name: one_execution_per_annotator
assertions.description: Should recommend one execution per pathologist (not one per image)

assertions.name: batch_entries
assertions.description: Should show batching multiple entries in a single add_feature_value call

assertions.name: descriptive_workflow
assertions.description: Should use descriptive workflow names (e.g., 'Pathologist A Review')

assertions.name: stop_execution_after_batch
assertions.description: Should mention stop_execution after each annotator's batch

assertions.name: explains_provenance_benefit
assertions.description: Should explain that separate executions enable distinguishing labels by annotator
